languages.text: "Вы проверяете нашу боеготовность? "Вышестоящий командир имеет право внеочередной проверки обмундирования и оснащения гвардейцев". Теперь мне стала понятна эта строка Устава".

"Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Handbook meant."
languages.original_text: "Вы проверяете нашу боеготовность? "Вышестоящий командир имеет право внеочередной проверки обмундирования и оснащения гвардейцев". Теперь мне стала понятна эта строка Устава".

traits.locale_text: "Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Code meant."

"Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Code meant."
{n}Dunawski looks upset by your rejection of her gift, but she also lets out a sigh of relief — she clearly did not truly wish to part with the artefact.{/n}

"Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Handbook meant."

languages.text: {n}ダナウスキは、あなたが彼女の贈り物を拒んだことに不機嫌そうな顔を見せるが、同時に安堵のため息も漏らす――明らかに彼女はその遺物と本当に別れたいわけではなかったのだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski looks upset by your rejection of her gift, but she also lets out a sigh of relief — she clearly did not truly wish to part with the artefact.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ダナウスキは、あなたが彼女の贈り物を拒んだことに不機嫌そうな顔を見せるが、同時に安堵のため息も漏らす――明らかに彼女はその遺物と本当に別れたいわけではなかったのだ。{/n}

languages.text: « Ah, vous vouliez savoir si nous étions parés au combat ? "Un officier supérieur peut procéder à tout moment à une inspection spontanée de l'uniforme et de l'équipement des gardes." Je comprends désormais mieux le sens de cette partie du Manuel. »
languages.original_text: "Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Handbook meant."

traits.locale_text: « Ah, vous vouliez savoir si nous étions parés au combat ? "Un officier supérieur peut procéder à tout moment à une inspection spontanée de l'uniforme et de l'équipement des gardes." Je comprends désormais mieux le sens de cette partie du Manuel. »

languages.text: "Ha, savaşa hazırlık durumumuzu mu kontrol ediyordunuz? 'Üstler, Muhafızların üniforma ve teçhizatını herhangi bir zamanda habersiz olarak denetleyebilir.' El Kitabı'ndakki o cümlenin ne anlama geldiğini şimdi anladım."
languages.original_text: "Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Handbook meant."

traits.locale_text: "Ha, savaşa hazırlık durumumuzu mu kontrol ediyordunuz? 'Üstler, Muhafızların üniforma ve teçhizatını herhangi bir zamanda habersiz olarak denetleyebilir.' El Kitabı'ndakki o cümlenin ne anlama geldiğini şimdi anladım."

languages.text: "Ah, Ihr wolltet unsere Kampfbereitschaft testen? 'Ein ranghoher Offizier kann jederzeit eine unangekündigte Inspektion der Uniform und Ausrüstung der Gardisten durchführen'. Jetzt verstehe ich, was diese Zeile aus dem Handbuch bedeutet."
languages.original_text: "Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Handbook meant."

traits.locale_text: "Ah, Ihr wolltet unsere Kampfbereitschaft testen? 'Ein ranghoher Offizier kann jederzeit eine unangekündigte Inspektion der Uniform und Ausrüstung der Gardisten durchführen'. Jetzt verstehe ich, was diese Zeile aus dem Handbuch bedeutet."

languages.text: «Ah, ¿estaba llevando a cabo una inspección de los preparativos? "Un oficial superior podrá efectuar una inspección sorpresa del uniforme y el equipo de la Guardia en cualquier momento". Por fin entiendo esa parte del manual».
languages.original_text: "Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Handbook meant."

traits.locale_text: «Ah, ¿estaba llevando a cabo una inspección de los preparativos? "Un oficial superior podrá efectuar una inspección sorpresa del uniforme y el equipo de la Guardia en cualquier momento". Por fin entiendo esa parte del manual».

languages.text: “啊，您是在检查我们的战备情况？‘上级军官可随时对卫兵的着装和装备进行突击检查。’现在我总算明白《手册》里那句话是什么意思了。”
languages.original_text: "Ah, you were checking our combat readiness? 'A superior officer may conduct an unplanned inspection of the Guardsmen's uniform and equipment at any time.' Now I understand what that line from the Handbook meant."

traits.locale_text: “啊，您是在检查我们的战备情况？‘上级军官可随时对卫兵的着装和装备进行突击检查。’现在我总算明白《手册》里那句话是什么意思了。”
